data.name: The Blood Diary
data.detailed_description:
Add our new game to your wishlist!


關於此遊戲

What must happen for even a creature that spreads death to lose the will to live? Simply having a treacherous sorcerer among one’s allies. In the endless routine of eternal life, only a diary remains — the last attempt to stay sane. But what is there to write when days and nights blur into a monotonous flow? And only one new encounter can break this vicious circle… or make it even more terrifying.

Story

The game’s story reveals the backstory of Selena, a vampire from the world of Knightly Passions.

The Kingdom of Gelrond is a land of fragile truce, where darkness and magic have long been part of everyday life, and vampires are not legends, but reality.

One young woman living in these lands is turned into a vampire against her will. She loses her former life, friends, and freedom, gaining only the one who took her humanity. He is an ancient vampire, trapped by his own design. She is his unwilling creation - and his only chance to escape.

You will witness their dangerous alliance, shaping Selena’s fate: completing tasks, obeying her mentor, sinking ever deeper into the darkness, and gradually blurring the line between command, dependence, and temptation.

This bond may become salvation - or the final curse for them both.

Combat System and Skill Progression

As the story unfolds, Selena will face many dangerous enemies, and victory in open combat will demand focus and tactical thinking. The combat system blends turn-based mechanics with JRPG-inspired dynamics, rewarding well-timed actions and punishing mistakes.

As her vampiric nature grows stronger, her mastery deepens, new abilities and combos unlock, and her fighting style becomes your choice.

Explore the skill tree, combine abilities, and shape your own combat style. The path you choose directly affects battle tactics and how the character feels in combat.

Mini-Games and Exploration

Even far from battle, the world offers no rest. Beyond familiar paths lie forgotten places, hidden caches, and forbidden areas that cannot be reached at first glance. Many are guarded by ancient spells, traps, and puzzles that demand attention and wit.

As you explore, you will encounter a variety of mini-games, gradually uncovering the world’s secrets and lore. Every barrier you overcome is not just a challenge, but a step toward understanding the heroes’ past and the nature of the darkness they must face.

Spicy Content (18+)

A frightened and broken girl, who has endured suffering because of you, can be kept close with promises of help. She may be persuaded into a cooperation that benefits you both.

But to replace fear and distrust in her eyes with passion and desire, something far more will be required.

Can you make the heart beat faster that you once condemned to death yourself? And will it be genuine affection - or just another form of control?

Choice

Every word and every decision matters. A careless phrase or a wrong step can change the course of events and determine who will stand by your side - enemy or ally. Sometimes, a single choice is enough to change someone’s fate forever.

Build your own story, find unexpected allies (not all of them human), and lead the narrative to an ending shaped solely by you and your decisions.

Light or Darkness?

And what is one to do when an endless thirst for blood turns the path into the road of a killer, living among the ghosts of their own victims? It seems there is nothing ahead but downfall. Yet even the greatest evil can become the beginning of change.

If you stop giving in to the demons within, perhaps even a dead heart can find hope again. Every choice has a price. It is you who will decide who the heroine becomes - a prisoner of darkness, or one who manages to break free from its grasp.

Game Features

  • An atmospheric visual novel with JRPG elements, combining a dark storyline with active gameplay

  • Turn-based combat with skill and ability progression, allowing you to shape your own combat style

  • A non-linear story and choice system that directly influence relationships, events, and the ending

  • World exploration and mini-games that reveal lore, the kingdom’s secrets, and the heroes’ past

  • Sensual scenes (18+) and deep psychological dynamics between characters

  • Original music and a striking visual style, creating a sense of dark, captivating beauty

data.short_description: A new acquaintance turns into a tragedy for a girl seeking refuge. Death spares her, leaving her with a terrifying curse—vampirism. Pain and trials lie ahead, threatening her humanity. But is there another path, and can different worlds find common ground?
data.supported_languages: 俄文, 英文, 日文, 簡體中文

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10/11
  • 處理器: 2.0 GHz or faster processor
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: 2 GB display memory
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Mac OS X 10.6
  • 處理器: Apple M1
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: 2 GB display memory
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Linux x86/x86_64
  • 處理器: 2.0 GHz or faster processor
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: 2 GB display memory
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間
